headline: Is Humana’s (HUM) Mail-Order Expansion Quietly Redefining Its Integrated Care Advantage?
summary: Humana Inc. recently began full operations at its new US$83 million, 162,000-square-foot CenterWell Pharmacy mail-order distribution center in Orlando, which can process up to 64,000 prescriptions per day and serves members nationwide. This third CenterWell mail-order facility expands Humana’s pharmacy infrastructure and supports its push into payer-agnostic, direct-to-consumer and direct-to-employer medication fulfillment. We’ll now examine how this expanded CenterWell Pharmacy capacity may...
